lines.english: What is that speech, by which I may please the Supreme Lord God? ||1||Pause||
What worship service shall I perform for You?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਗੁਨੁ ਜੋ ਤੁਝੁ ਲੈ ਗਾਵਉ ॥
lines.translit: kavan gun jo tujh lai gaavau |
lines.english: What is that virtue, by which I may sing of You?
What is that penance, by which I may become a penitent?

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨੁ ਸੁ ਨਾਮੁ ਹਉਮੈ ਮਲੁ ਖੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kavan su naam haumai mal khoe |3|
lines.english: What is that Name, by which the filth of egotism may be washed away? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨ ਸੁ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਿਤੁ ਭਵਜਲ ਤਰਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kavan su bidh jit bhavajal trau |2|
lines.english: How can I cross over the terrifying world-ocean? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਣ ਪੂਜਾ ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਸਗਲ ਘਾਲ ॥
lines.translit: gun poojaa giaan dhiaan naanak sagal ghaal |
lines.english: Virtue, worship, spiritual wisdom, meditation and all service, O Nanak,

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਕਰਿ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਸਤਿਗੁਰੁ ਮਿਲੈ ਦਇਆਲ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: jis kar kirapaa satigur milai deaal |4|
lines.english: are obtained from the True Guru, when, in His Mercy and Kindness, He meets us. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸ ਕੀ ਮਾਨਿ ਲੇਇ ਸੁਖਦਾਤਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ਦੂਜਾ ॥੩੬॥੧੦੫॥
lines.translit: jis kee maan lee sukhadaataa |1| rahaau doojaa |36|105|
lines.english: who are approved by the Giver of peace. ||1||Second Pause||36||105||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਹੀ ਗੁਨੁ ਤਿਨ ਹੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਜਾਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis hee gun tin hee prabh jaataa |
lines.english: They alone receive this merit, and they alone know God,
Power, property and wealth are not yours. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਤਨੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਗਰਬਾ ॥
lines.translit: aapan tan nahee jaa ko garabaa |
lines.english: The body which you are so proud of, does not belong to you.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਨ ਨਾਮੁ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਪਾਇਓ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aapan naam satigur te paaeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Only the Naam, the Name of the Lord, is yours; it is received from the True Guru. ||1||Pause||
They are not yours, so why do you cling to them?

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਸਟ ਮੀਤ ਆਪ ਬਾਪੁ ਨ ਮਾਈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: eisatt meet aap baap na maaee |2|
lines.english: Dear friends, mother and father are not yours. ||2||
Gold, silver and money are not yours.
Children, spouse and siblings are not yours.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸ ਕਾ ਸਭੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਜਿਸ ਕਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਾਇਆ ॥੪॥੩੭॥੧੦੬॥
lines.translit: tis kaa sabh kichh jis kaa har raaeaa |4|37|106|
lines.english: Everything belongs to those who have the Lord as their King. ||4||37||106||
Fine horses and magnificent elephants are of no use to you. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਹੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਜੋ ਗੁਰਿ ਬਖਸਿ ਮਿਲਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kahu naanak jo gur bakhas milaaeaa |
lines.english: Says Nanak, those whom the Guru forgives, meet with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੇ ਚਰਣ ਊਪਰਿ ਮੇਰੇ ਮਾਥੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur ke charan aoopar mere maathe |
lines.english: I place the Guru's Feet on my forehead,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਾ ਤੇ ਦੁਖ ਮੇਰੇ ਸਗਲੇ ਲਾਥੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: taa te dukh mere sagale laathe |1|
lines.english: and all my pains are gone. ||1||
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਤਮ ਚੀਨਿ ਪਰਮ ਰੰਗ ਮਾਨੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: aatam cheen param rang maanee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I have come to understand my soul, and I enjoy supreme bliss. ||1||Pause||
I am a sacrifice to my True Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਲਗੋ ਮਨਿ ਮੀਠਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur kaa sabad lago man meetthaa |
lines.english: The Word of the Guru's Shabad has become sweet to my mind,
which has removed all my arrogant intellect. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਚਰਣ ਰੇਣੁ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਮੁਖਿ ਲਾਗੀ ॥
lines.translit: charan ren gur kee mukh laagee |
lines.english: I have applied the dust of the Guru's Feet to my face,
The Guru is the Giver of peace; the Guru is the Creator.
O Nanak, the Guru is the Support of the breath of life and the soul. ||4||38||107||
and I behold the Supreme Lord God. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੂੰ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਆਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man mere toon taa kau aaeh |
lines.english: O my mind, seek the One,
who lacks nothing. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਾ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਮੁ ਕਰਿ ਮਨ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: har saa preetam kar man meet |
lines.english: Make the Beloved Lord your friend.
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਅਧਾਰੁ ਰਾਖਹੁ ਸਦ ਚੀਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: praan adhaar raakhahu sad cheet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Keep Him constantly in your mind; He is the Support of the breath of life. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੇ ਮਨ ਮੇਰੇ ਤੂੰ ਤਾ ਕਉ ਸੇਵਿ ॥
lines.translit: re man mere toon taa kau sev |
lines.english: O my mind, serve Him;
who is the Support of all beings, from the very beginning of time, and throughout the ages. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਊਪਰਿ ਮਨ ਕਰਿ ਤੂੰ ਆਸਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis aoopar man kar toon aasaa |
lines.english: Place your hopes in the One
He is the Primal Being, the Infinite Divine Lord. ||2||
meeting the Guru, Nanak sings His Glorious Praises. ||4||39||108||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਸਦਾ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kee preet sadaa sukh hoe |
lines.english: His Love brings eternal peace;
Gauree, Fifth Mehl:
My Friend's actions are pleasing to me. ||1||
Within my conscious mind, the One Lord is my only Support.
Whatever my Friend does, I accept.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੁ ਹਮਰਾ ਮੀਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jis kichh karanaa su hamaraa meet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: One who does this is my Friend. ||1||Pause||
By Guru's Grace, I give my love to Him. ||2||
My Friend is Carefree.
I am Your servant; You are my Lord and Master.
My Friend is the Inner-knower, the Searcher of hearts.
He is the All-powerful Being, the Supreme Lord and Master. ||3||
